title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, an always-on cloud environment where AI agents can build, deploy, and run software with access to Ubuntu, databases, storage, terminal, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live application deployment by providing agents with real infrastructure and hosting capabilities.
